Assembly: The metagenome-assembled genome assembly piParDeut1.Bryobacteraceae_1.1 is based on 76x PacBio data generated by the Aquatic Symbiosis Genomics Project (https://www.aquaticsymbiosisgenomics.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with metaMDBG and coverage-, graph-, and HiC-based contig binning.
